parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT u.n8n_user_id as user_id, s.id as source_id, s.url as source_url, s.name as source_name, COALESCE(u.settings->'radar'->>'priorities_markdown', '') as priorities, COALESCE(u.settings->>'timezone', 'Europe/Amsterdam') as timezone FROM radar_sources s JOIN portal_user u ON u.n8n_user_id = s.user_id WHERE s.status = 'followed' AND COALESCE(u.settings->'radar'->>'priorities_markdown', '') != ''

SELECT DISTINCT u.n8n_user_id as user_id, s.id as source_id, s.url as source_url, s.name as source_name, COALESCE(u.settings->'radar'->>'priorities_markdown', '') as priorities, COALESCE(u.settings->>'timezone', 'Europe/Amsterdam') as timezone FROM radar_sources s JOIN portal_user u ON u.n8n_user_id = s.user_id WHERE s.status = 'followed' AND COALESCE(u.settings->'radar'->>'priorities_markdown', '') != ''
